title: Underworld: A Galaxy of Scum and Villainy
content:

"'''Underworld: A Galaxy of Scum and Villainy'''" is an article appearing in [[Star Wars Insider 89|''Star Wars Insider'' 89]]. It is written by [[Abel G. Peña]] and [[Ryan Kaufman (real person)|Ryan Kaufman]], and illustrated by [[Joe Corroney]]. Its focus was on "''[[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]], [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]], [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]], [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lords]] and other assorted scum and villainy.''"

{{Magazine-stub|article}}
